title: The Friend Whose Face Lights Up
subtitle: A visualisation for picturing the exact person whose hope is given by seeing your financial ease lived openly
excerpt: A short visualisation from the Day 82 theme of a 12-week money programme. You picture one specific friend, share your news, and watch their face change. The image names why visible abundance is not performance but permission.
sourceNotes: Original visualisation created for homemade.education, drawing on the Day 82 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you feel the pull to dim your financial news around people you care about, and want to remember what your openness gives them.

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 82 theme: inspire others through your wealth. The image is one person, one face, one moment of recognition.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or let your gaze soften.
Bring to mind one specific person. A friend, a sister, a colleague. Someone who is trying, who is working toward something, who sometimes doubts whether it will come.

Picture the two of you in a normal place. A kitchen, a coffee shop, a phone call. You share something good. A decision that worked out. A number you once only hoped for. A choice you made from abundance instead of fear.
Watch their face. Something shifts. Not jealousy. Something else. A spark of belief that what you have built is something they might also build. You become evidence.
You did not make that happen by managing your news carefully. You made it happen by telling the truth.
Sit with their face for a moment.
Open your eyes when you are ready.
Original to homemade.education. Draws on the Day 82 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
